title: calceolaria × youngii
intro: Calceolaria × youngii, also known as the Slipper Flower, is a hybrid plant species of Calceolaria, characterized by its distinctive, bell-shaped flowers and vibrant colors. The medicinal properties of Calceolaria × youngii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Calceolaria × youngii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried flowers in hot water, and it can also be used as a calming extract in capsule or tincture form.
